```{r Export-Leaflet-Risk-Map-HTML}
    Haiti_adm2_map_data <- Haiti_adm2_boundaries |>
      bind_cols(zonal_stats_adm2) |>
      left_join(
        jiaf_deprivation_primary,
        by = c("ADM2_PCODE" = "admin2_pc")
      ) |>
      mutate(
        suitability_change_1_5C = mean_suitability_1_5C - mean_baseline_suitability,
        suitability_change_2C   = mean_suitability_2C   - mean_baseline_suitability,
        suitability_change_3C   = mean_suitability_3C   - mean_baseline_suitability,
        suitability_change_4C   = mean_suitability_4C   - mean_baseline_suitability
      )

  # Prepare commune-level suitability data for risk calculation
    commune_suit_for_risk <- Haiti_adm2_map_data |>
      sf::st_drop_geometry() |>
      dplyr::select(
        ADM2_PCODE, ADM2_EN, ADM1_EN, population,
        mean_baseline_suitability,
        mean_suitability_1_5C,
        mean_suitability_2C,
        mean_suitability_3C,
        mean_suitability_4C
      ) |>
      tidyr::pivot_longer(
        cols = starts_with("mean_"),
        names_to = "scenario",
        values_to = "mean_suitability"
      ) |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        warming_level = dplyr::case_when(
          scenario == "mean_baseline_suitability" ~ 0,
          scenario == "mean_suitability_1_5C"     ~ 1.5,
          scenario == "mean_suitability_2C"       ~ 2,
          scenario == "mean_suitability_3C"       ~ 3,
          scenario == "mean_suitability_4C"       ~ 4
        )
      ) |>
      dplyr::select(-scenario) |>
      dplyr::filter(!is.na(population), population > 0)

  # Prepare vulnerability data (two indices only)
    vulnerability_data <- Haiti_adm2_map_data |>
      sf::st_drop_geometry() |>
      dplyr::select(
        ADM2_PCODE, ADM2_EN, ADM1_EN, population,
        vuln_arith = index_comp_wt_norm,
        vuln_max   = index_max_wt_norm
      ) |>
      dplyr::filter(!is.na(population), population > 0)

  # Calculate risk indices
    calculate_risk_indices <- function(commune_data, vulnerability_data) {
      merged_data <- commune_data |>
        dplyr::left_join(
          vulnerability_data |> dplyr::select(ADM2_PCODE, vuln_arith, vuln_max),
          by = "ADM2_PCODE"
        ) |>
        dplyr::filter(
          !is.na(mean_suitability),
          !is.na(population),
          !is.na(vuln_arith)
        )
      
      risk_data <- merged_data |>
        dplyr::group_by(warming_level) |>
        dplyr::mutate(
          # Within-scenario normalization
            hazard_norm = (mean_suitability - min(mean_suitability, na.rm = TRUE)) /
              (max(mean_suitability, na.rm = TRUE) - min(mean_suitability, na.rm = TRUE)),
            exposure_norm = (population - min(population, na.rm = TRUE)) /
              (max(population, na.rm = TRUE) - min(population, na.rm = TRUE)),
          
          # Risk calculations (two indices only)
            risk_arith = hazard_norm * exposure_norm * vuln_arith,
            risk_max   = hazard_norm * exposure_norm * vuln_max,
          
          # Percentile ranks (0-100 scale)
            risk_arith_percentile = dplyr::percent_rank(risk_arith) * 100,
            risk_max_percentile   = dplyr::percent_rank(risk_max) * 100
        ) |>
        dplyr::ungroup()
      
      risk_data
    }

  # Calculate risk indices for all warming levels
    risk_index_data <- calculate_risk_indices(commune_suit_for_risk, vulnerability_data)

  # Pivot risk data back to wide format for joining
    risk_wide <- risk_index_data |>
      dplyr::select(ADM2_PCODE, warming_level, risk_arith, risk_max,
                    risk_arith_percentile, risk_max_percentile) |>
      tidyr::pivot_wider(
        id_cols = ADM2_PCODE,
        names_from = warming_level,
        values_from = c(risk_arith, risk_max, risk_arith_percentile, risk_max_percentile),
        names_glue = "{.value}_{warming_level}"
      )

  # Join risk indices to spatial data
    Haiti_adm2_map_data <- Haiti_adm2_map_data |>
      left_join(risk_wide, by = "ADM2_PCODE") |>
      mutate(
        across(starts_with("mean_"), \(x) round(x, 3)),
        across(starts_with("suitability_change"), \(x) round(x, 3)),
        across(starts_with("index_"), \(x) round(x, 3)),
        across(starts_with("risk_arith_") & !contains("percentile"), \(x) round(x, 4)),
        across(starts_with("risk_max_") & !contains("percentile"), \(x) round(x, 4)),
        across(contains("percentile"), \(x) round(x, 1))
      )

  # Create popup HTML with all metrics (suitability, vulnerability, and risk)
    Haiti_adm2_map_data <- Haiti_adm2_map_data |>
      mutate(
        popup_html = paste0(
          "<div style='font-family: Arial; font-size: 12px; max-width: 420px;'>",
          "<div style='font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 4px;'>", ADM2_EN, "</div>",
          "<div style='color:#444; margin-bottom: 6px;'>", ADM1_EN, " • ", ADM2_PCODE, "</div>",
          
          # Suitability section
            "<hr style='margin: 6px 0; border-color: #ddd;'>",
            "<b style='color: #B8860B;'><i>Aedes aegypti</i> Suitability</b><br>",
            "<table style='width:100%; font-size:11px; margin-top:4px;'>",
            "<tr><td>Baseline:</td><td style='text-align:right;'>", mean_baseline_suitability, "</td></tr>",
            "<tr><td>+1.5°C:</td><td style='text-align:right;'>", mean_suitability_1_5C,
              " <span style='color:", ifelse(suitability_change_1_5C >= 0, "green", "red"), ";'>(",
              ifelse(suitability_change_1_5C >= 0, "+", ""), suitability_change_1_5C, ")</span></td></tr>",
            "<tr><td>+2°C:</td><td style='text-align:right;'>", mean_suitability_2C,
              " <span style='color:", ifelse(suitability_change_2C >= 0, "green", "red"), ";'>(",
              ifelse(suitability_change_2C >= 0, "+", ""), suitability_change_2C, ")</span></td></tr>",
            "<tr><td>+3°C:</td><td style='text-align:right;'>", mean_suitability_3C,
              " <span style='color:", ifelse(suitability_change_3C >= 0, "green", "red"), ";'>(",
              ifelse(suitability_change_3C >= 0, "+", ""), suitability_change_3C, ")</span></td></tr>",
            "<tr><td>+4°C:</td><td style='text-align:right;'>", mean_suitability_4C,
              " <span style='color:", ifelse(suitability_change_4C >= 0, "green", "red"), ";'>(",
              ifelse(suitability_change_4C >= 0, "+", ""), suitability_change_4C, ")</span></td></tr>",
            "</table>",
          
          # Vulnerability section
            "<hr style='margin: 6px 0; border-color: #ddd;'>",
            "<b style='color: #D84315;'>JIAF Vulnerability Indices</b><br>",
            "<table style='width:100%; font-size:11px; margin-top:4px;'>",
            "<tr><td>Compensatory:</td><td style='text-align:right;'><b>",
              ifelse(is.na(index_comp_wt_norm), "No data", index_comp_wt_norm), "</b></td></tr>",
            "<tr><td>Maximum:</td><td style='text-align:right;'>",
              ifelse(is.na(index_max_wt_norm), "No data", index_max_wt_norm), "</td></tr>",
            "</table>",
          
          # Risk index section - Compensatory
            "<hr style='margin: 6px 0; border-color: #ddd;'>",
            "<b style='color: #6A1B9A;'>Risk Index (Compensatory)</b><br>",
            "<table style='width:100%; font-size:11px; margin-top:4px;'>",
            "<tr><td>Baseline:</td><td style='text-align:right;'>",
              ifelse(is.na(`risk_arith_0`), "No data", `risk_arith_0`),
              " <span style='color:#888;'>(", ifelse(is.na(`risk_arith_percentile_0`), "-", `risk_arith_percentile_0`), "%ile)</span></td></tr>",
            "<tr><td>+1.5°C:</td><td style='text-align:right;'>",
              ifelse(is.na(`risk_arith_1.5`), "No data", `risk_arith_1.5`),
              " <span style='color:#888;'>(", ifelse(is.na(`risk_arith_percentile_1.5`), "-", `risk_arith_percentile_1.5`), "%ile)</span></td></tr>",
            "<tr><td>+2°C:</td><td style='text-align:right;'>",
              ifelse(is.na(`risk_arith_2`), "No data", `risk_arith_2`),
              " <span style='color:#888;'>(", ifelse(is.na(`risk_arith_percentile_2`), "-", `risk_arith_percentile_2`), "%ile)</span></td></tr>",
            "<tr><td>+3°C:</td><td style='text-align:right;'>",
              ifelse(is.na(`risk_arith_3`), "No data", `risk_arith_3`),
              " <span style='color:#888;'>(", ifelse(is.na(`risk_arith_percentile_3`), "-", `risk_arith_percentile_3`), "%ile)</span></td></tr>",
            "<tr><td>+4°C:</td><td style='text-align:right;'>",
              ifelse(is.na(`risk_arith_4`), "No data", `risk_arith_4`),
              " <span style='color:#888;'>(", ifelse(is.na(`risk_arith_percentile_4`), "-", `risk_arith_percentile_4`), "%ile)</span></td></tr>",
            "</table>",
          
          # Risk index section - Maximum
            "<hr style='margin: 6px 0; border-color: #ddd;'>",
            "<b style='color: #4A148C;'>Risk Index (Maximum)</b><br>",
            "<table style='width:100%; font-size:11px; margin-top:4px;'>",
            "<tr><td>Baseline:</td><td style='text-align:right;'>",
              ifelse(is.na(`risk_max_0`), "No data", `risk_max_0`),
              " <span style='color:#888;'>(", ifelse(is.na(`risk_max_percentile_0`), "-", `risk_max_percentile_0`), "%ile)</span></td></tr>",
            "<tr><td>+1.5°C:</td><td style='text-align:right;'>",
              ifelse(is.na(`risk_max_1.5`), "No data", `risk_max_1.5`),
              " <span style='color:#888;'>(", ifelse(is.na(`risk_max_percentile_1.5`), "-", `risk_max_percentile_1.5`), "%ile)</span></td></tr>",
            "<tr><td>+2°C:</td><td style='text-align:right;'>",
              ifelse(is.na(`risk_max_2`), "No data", `risk_max_2`),
              " <span style='color:#888;'>(", ifelse(is.na(`risk_max_percentile_2`), "-", `risk_max_percentile_2`), "%ile)</span></td></tr>",
            "<tr><td>+3°C:</td><td style='text-align:right;'>",
              ifelse(is.na(`risk_max_3`), "No data", `risk_max_3`),
              " <span style='color:#888;'>(", ifelse(is.na(`risk_max_percentile_3`), "-", `risk_max_percentile_3`), "%ile)</span></td></tr>",
            "<tr><td>+4°C:</td><td style='text-align:right;'>",
              ifelse(is.na(`risk_max_4`), "No data", `risk_max_4`),
              " <span style='color:#888;'>(", ifelse(is.na(`risk_max_percentile_4`), "-", `risk_max_percentile_4`), "%ile)</span></td></tr>",
            "</table>",
          
          # Population footer
            "<hr style='margin: 6px 0; border-color: #ddd;'>",
            "<span style='color:#666;'>Population: ",
              ifelse(is.na(population), "No data", scales::comma(population)),
            " | Sector coverage: ",
              ifelse(is.na(sector_coverage_pct), "No data", paste0(sector_coverage_pct, "%")),
            "</span>",
          "</div>"
        )
      )

  # Define color palette for risk percentiles (0-100 scale) using magma
    risk_percentile_pal <- leaflet::colorNumeric(
      palette  = viridisLite::magma(256),
      domain   = c(0, 100),
      na.color = "grey85"
    )

  # Custom legend control function for percentiles (high values at top)
    legend_control_percentile <- function(id, title) {
      brks <- seq(0, 100, by = 20)
      cols <- risk_percentile_pal(brks)
      
      # Reverse order so high values appear at top
        brks_rev <- rev(brks)
        cols_rev <- rev(cols)
      
      tags$div(
        id = id,
        class = "map-legend",
        style = paste0(
          "background: rgba(255,255,255,0.92); padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 8px; ",
          "box-shadow: 0 1px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.25); font-size: 12px; line-height: 1.15;"
        ),
        tags$div(style = "font-weight:700; margin-bottom:6px;", title),
        tags$div(
          lapply(seq_along(brks_rev), function(i) {
            tags$div(
              style = "display:flex; align-items:center; margin:2px 0;",
              tags$div(
                style = paste0(
                  "width:14px;height:14px;border-radius:3px;margin-right:8px;background:",
                  cols_rev[i], ";"
                )
              ),
              tags$div(paste0(brks_rev[i], "%"))
            )
          })
        )
      )
    }

  # Build the commune risk map (percentile-based, risk layers only)
    Haiti_Risk_Map <- leaflet(
        Haiti_adm2_map_data,
        options = leafletOptions(preferCanvas = TRUE)
      ) |>
      
      # Base tiles
        addProviderTiles("CartoDB.Positron", group = "Light") |>
        addProviderTiles("OpenStreetMap", group = "OpenStreetMap") |>
        addProviderTiles("Esri.WorldImagery", group = "Satellite") |>
        setView(lng = -72.3, lat = 19.0, zoom = 8) |>
      
      # Risk layers - Compensatory (percentiles)
        addPolygons(
          fillColor   = ~risk_percentile_pal(`risk_arith_percentile_0`),
          fillOpacity = 0.75, color = "white", weight = 1, opacity = 1,
          group = "Risk (Comp): Baseline",
          highlightOptions = highlightOptions(weight = 2, color = "#333", fillOpacity = 0.9, bringToFront = TRUE),
          popup = ~popup_html,
          label = ~paste0(ADM2_EN, " • ", round(`risk_arith_percentile_0`, 0), "th %ile")
        ) |>
        addPolygons(
          fillColor   = ~risk_percentile_pal(`risk_arith_percentile_1.5`),
          fillOpacity = 0.75, color = "white", weight = 1, opacity = 1,
          group = "Risk (Comp): +1.5°C",
          highlightOptions = highlightOptions(weight = 2, color = "#333", fillOpacity = 0.9, bringToFront = TRUE),
          popup = ~popup_html,
          label = ~paste0(ADM2_EN, " • ", round(`risk_arith_percentile_1.5`, 0), "th %ile")
        ) |>
        addPolygons(
          fillColor   = ~risk_percentile_pal(`risk_arith_percentile_2`),
          fillOpacity = 0.75, color = "white", weight = 1, opacity = 1,
          group = "Risk (Comp): +2°C",
          highlightOptions = highlightOptions(weight = 2, color = "#333", fillOpacity = 0.9, bringToFront = TRUE),
          popup = ~popup_html,
          label = ~paste0(ADM2_EN, " • ", round(`risk_arith_percentile_2`, 0), "th %ile")
        ) |>
        addPolygons(
          fillColor   = ~risk_percentile_pal(`risk_arith_percentile_3`),
          fillOpacity = 0.75, color = "white", weight = 1, opacity = 1,
          group = "Risk (Comp): +3°C",
          highlightOptions = highlightOptions(weight = 2, color = "#333", fillOpacity = 0.9, bringToFront = TRUE),
          popup = ~popup_html,
          label = ~paste0(ADM2_EN, " • ", round(`risk_arith_percentile_3`, 0), "th %ile")
        ) |>
        addPolygons(
          fillColor   = ~risk_percentile_pal(`risk_arith_percentile_4`),
          fillOpacity = 0.75, color = "white", weight = 1, opacity = 1,
          group = "Risk (Comp): +4°C",
          highlightOptions = highlightOptions(weight = 2, color = "#333", fillOpacity = 0.9, bringToFront = TRUE),
          popup = ~popup_html,
          label = ~paste0(ADM2_EN, " • ", round(`risk_arith_percentile_4`, 0), "th %ile")
        ) |>
      
      # Risk layers - Maximum (percentiles)
        addPolygons(
          fillColor   = ~risk_percentile_pal(`risk_max_percentile_0`),
          fillOpacity = 0.75, color = "white", weight = 1, opacity = 1,
          group = "Risk (Max): Baseline",
          highlightOptions = highlightOptions(weight = 2, color = "#333", fillOpacity = 0.9, bringToFront = TRUE),
          popup = ~popup_html,
          label = ~paste0(ADM2_EN, " • ", round(`risk_max_percentile_0`, 0), "th %ile")
        ) |>
        addPolygons(
          fillColor   = ~risk_percentile_pal(`risk_max_percentile_1.5`),
          fillOpacity = 0.75, color = "white", weight = 1, opacity = 1,
          group = "Risk (Max): +1.5°C",
          highlightOptions = highlightOptions(weight = 2, color = "#333", fillOpacity = 0.9, bringToFront = TRUE),
          popup = ~popup_html,
          label = ~paste0(ADM2_EN, " • ", round(`risk_max_percentile_1.5`, 0), "th %ile")
        ) |>
        addPolygons(
          fillColor   = ~risk_percentile_pal(`risk_max_percentile_2`),
          fillOpacity = 0.75, color = "white", weight = 1, opacity = 1,
          group = "Risk (Max): +2°C",
          highlightOptions = highlightOptions(weight = 2, color = "#333", fillOpacity = 0.9, bringToFront = TRUE),
          popup = ~popup_html,
          label = ~paste0(ADM2_EN, " • ", round(`risk_max_percentile_2`, 0), "th %ile")
        ) |>
        addPolygons(
          fillColor   = ~risk_percentile_pal(`risk_max_percentile_3`),
          fillOpacity = 0.75, color = "white", weight = 1, opacity = 1,
          group = "Risk (Max): +3°C",
          highlightOptions = highlightOptions(weight = 2, color = "#333", fillOpacity = 0.9, bringToFront = TRUE),
          popup = ~popup_html,
          label = ~paste0(ADM2_EN, " • ", round(`risk_max_percentile_3`, 0), "th %ile")
        ) |>
        addPolygons(
          fillColor   = ~risk_percentile_pal(`risk_max_percentile_4`),
          fillOpacity = 0.75, color = "white", weight = 1, opacity = 1,
          group = "Risk (Max): +4°C",
          highlightOptions = highlightOptions(weight = 2, color = "#333", fillOpacity = 0.9, bringToFront = TRUE),
          popup = ~popup_html,
          label = ~paste0(ADM2_EN, " • ", round(`risk_max_percentile_4`, 0), "th %ile")
        ) |>
      
      # Layer controls
        addLayersControl(
          baseGroups = c("Light", "OpenStreetMap", "Satellite"),
          overlayGroups = c(
            # Risk Compensatory group
              "Risk (Comp): Baseline",
              "Risk (Comp): +1.5°C",
              "Risk (Comp): +2°C",
              "Risk (Comp): +3°C",
              "Risk (Comp): +4°C",
            # Risk Maximum group
              "Risk (Max): Baseline",
              "Risk (Max): +1.5°C",
              "Risk (Max): +2°C",
              "Risk (Max): +3°C",
              "Risk (Max): +4°C"
          ),
          options = layersControlOptions(collapsed = FALSE),
          position = "topleft"
        ) |>
      
      # Show only compensatory baseline by default
        hideGroup(c(
          "Risk (Comp): +1.5°C", "Risk (Comp): +2°C", "Risk (Comp): +3°C", "Risk (Comp): +4°C",
          "Risk (Max): Baseline", "Risk (Max): +1.5°C", "Risk (Max): +2°C", "Risk (Max): +3°C", "Risk (Max): +4°C"
        )) |>
      
      # Add legend (high values at top)
        addControl(
          html = legend_control_percentile("legend_risk", "Risk Percentile"),
          position = "bottomright"
        )

  # Save the map
    htmlwidgets::saveWidget(
      Haiti_Risk_Map,
      file = file.path(out_dir, "Haiti_Risk_Map.html"),
      selfcontained = TRUE
    )

  # Export to global environment
    assign("Haiti_Risk_Map", Haiti_Risk_Map, envir = .GlobalEnv)
    assign("Haiti_adm2_risk_data", Haiti_adm2_map_data, envir = .GlobalEnv)

  # Display the map
    Haiti_Risk_Map
```
